nosotrosPage.title: About Us
nosotrosPage.heroTitle: From our people, for our people
nosotrosPage.heroSubtitle: Our mission is to empower the Hispanic community through authentic social commerce
nosotrosPage.manifestoText1: We believe every Hispanic has the power to influence their community's purchasing decisions. You don't need millions of followers - you need trust.
nosotrosPage.manifestoText2: Ygente was born from a simple observation: the best product recommendations come from people we know and trust. Your aunt who always knows where to find the best deals. Your cousin who's the tech expert. Your neighbor with the best taste in beauty.
nosotrosPage.manifestoText3: We're building the platform that makes it possible for these authentic voices to monetize their natural influence, while brands access the Hispanic market genuinely.
nosotrosPage.value1Description: We prioritize real relationships over vanity metrics
nosotrosPage.value3Description: The foundation of everything we do
nosotrosPage.value4Description: We democratize access to extra income

circuloFundadorPage.title: Founding Circle
circuloFundadorPage.heroSubtitle: Join an exclusive group of pioneers who will define coselling in the Hispanic community
circuloFundadorPage.whatIsDescription: The Founding Circle is our exclusive program for the first 50 ambassadors and 25 brands that join Ygente before the official launch. As a founder, you'll have lifetime benefits and be part of the decisions that shape the platform.
circuloFundadorPage.applicationDescription: Complete the form below and our team will review your application within 48 hours.
circuloFundadorPage.formWhy: Why do you want to be part of the Founding Circle?
circuloFundadorPage.formSuccess: Application received! We'll contact you soon.

whatIsYgente.heading: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies.
whatIsYgente.body1: Most platforms connect buyers and sellers. Ygente connects communities.
whatIsYgente.body2: Every purchase strengthens local businesses, creators, ambassadors, and the communities where those purchases happen.
whatIsYgente.body3: We're building the first Hispanic Network Commonwealth.

commonwealth.title: The Commonwealth
commonwealth.tagline: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies.
commonwealth.lede: Ygente is more than a marketplace. It is a Network Commonwealth—an economic movement designed to help Hispanic communities create, circulate, and retain wealth together.
commonwealth.exploreSubtitle: Six ways to understand what we're building—and why.
commonwealth.visionDesc: The story of why Ygente exists, and the future we're building together.
commonwealth.worksDesc: How prosperity circulates through every transaction instead of leaving the community.
commonwealth.constitutionDesc: The founding covenant that defines our principles and binds us to them.
commonwealth.governanceDesc: How decisions are made close to the people they affect—support flows down, representation flows up.
commonwealth.territoriesDesc: A living network of communities, from nations to neighborhoods to ZIP codes.
commonwealth.stewardDesc: Communities are never owned. They are stewarded. Discover what that means—and how to lead.
commonwealth.principlesSubtitle: Enduring truths no amendment may ever contradict.
commonwealth.p1Desc: We care for communities; we do not possess them.
commonwealth.p2Desc: Value should circulate back into the communities that create it.
commonwealth.p3Desc: Decisions belong as close as possible to the people affected.
commonwealth.p5Desc: The organization exists to serve people, not the reverse.
commonwealth.p6Desc: Every decision weighs the generations who will inherit it.
commonwealth.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first to build a Commonwealth worthy of future generations.

visionPage.title: Our Vision
visionPage.heroSubtitle: Not a business plan. A belief about what commerce could be for our people.
visionPage.p1: For decades, Hispanic communities have generated hundreds of billions of dollars in purchasing power.
visionPage.p2: Yet much of that wealth leaves our neighborhoods. Businesses struggle to grow. Creators struggle to monetize. Communities struggle to retain the economic value they create.
visionPage.p3: Technology has connected billions of people. But it has rarely helped communities own the value they create.
visionPage.beliefsTitle: We believe there is another way.
visionPage.belief1: Every purchase should strengthen the neighborhood where it happens.
visionPage.belief2: Every entrepreneur should have local advocates.
visionPage.belief3: Every creator should help build lasting prosperity.
visionPage.closing: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies—so that the wealth our people create stays, circulates, and compounds among us.

commonwealthWorks.title: How the Commonwealth Works
commonwealthWorks.heroTitle: Prosperity that moves in circles, not pipelines.
commonwealthWorks.heroSubtitle: In an extractive economy, value flows out. In a Commonwealth, every transaction strengthens many participants at once.
commonwealthWorks.circleSubtitle: Every act of commerce is designed to benefit the whole circle—not a single company at the end of a pipeline.
commonwealthWorks.fivecsSubtitle: Community-powered growth for the AI economy. Each C feeds the next.
commonwealthWorks.mechTitle: How value stays in the community
commonwealthWorks.mechSubtitle: Three mechanisms keep prosperity circulating instead of concentrating.
commonwealthWorks.mech1Desc: Trust is the Commonwealth's highest form of capital. Earned through honesty, reliability, and service, it opens leadership opportunity—reputation you can't buy, only build.
commonwealthWorks.mech2Desc: Every Territory keeps a treasury reinvested locally: entrepreneur grants, scholarships, creator sponsorships, cultural celebrations, and emergency assistance.
commonwealthWorks.mech3Desc: A shared contribution that funds the Commons everyone depends on—technology, security, legal protection, education, and expansion. Not a tax; an investment in what benefits us all.
commonwealthWorks.ctaTitle: This is a covenant, not just a model.

governancePage.title: Governance
governancePage.heroTitle: Support flows down. Representation flows up.
governancePage.heroSubtitle: Authority in the Commonwealth exists to enable local leadership—never to replace it.
governancePage.subsidiarityBody: Decisions should always be made by the smallest capable community. Higher levels coordinate only when action must span many Territories. This preserves local knowledge, local accountability, local innovation, and local identity. Centralization is always the exception—never the default.
governancePage.representationSubtitle: Representation flows upward. Support flows downward. Knowledge flows in every direction.
governancePage.councilBody: The Council serves as guardian—not ruler—of the Commonwealth. It exists to enable local prosperity, never to replace local leadership.

territoriesPage.title: Territories
territoriesPage.heroSubtitle: One Commonwealth, many communities. Unity does not require uniformity.
territoriesPage.whatBody: A Territory is a living economic community. It may be a country, a state or province, a region or county, a city, a neighborhood, a ZIP code, or a recognized diaspora community. Territories evolve as communities evolve—each one exists to create local prosperity while strengthening the whole.
territoriesPage.treeSubtitle: Each Territory belongs to a parent. Each parent exists to support—not dominate—its children.
territoriesPage.principleBody: Power in the Commonwealth is inverted from the traditional corporation. A parent Territory's role is to cultivate the Territories beneath it: sharing knowledge, opening opportunity, and protecting the Commons—so that every community can govern what it knows best.

stewardPage.title: Become a Steward
stewardPage.heroTitle: Communities are never owned. They are stewarded.
stewardPage.heroSubtitle: A Steward accepts responsibility for cultivating the long-term prosperity of a Territory.
stewardPage.whatBody: Authority exists because responsibility exists. No Steward holds permanent power—stewardship is continually earned through contribution, and may transfer if the Covenant is not upheld. The purpose of leadership is not control. It is cultivation.
stewardPage.multiplyBody: Every Steward creates opportunity, develops future leaders, encourages entrepreneurship, strengthens trust, preserves culture, and mentors successors. Leadership is successful only when it becomes unnecessary—because new leaders have emerged. We inherit the work of previous generations, and prepare the foundation for those yet to come.
stewardPage.pledge1: I will strengthen trust before seeking profit.
stewardPage.pledge2: I will leave my community stronger than I found it.
stewardPage.pledge3: I will serve before I lead.
stewardPage.pledge4: I will protect the Commons entrusted to us.
stewardPage.pledge7: I will honor our culture while embracing innovation.
stewardPage.pledge8: I will measure success by the prosperity created for others.
stewardPage.pledge9: I will remember that every transaction represents a human relationship.
stewardPage.pledge10: I will help build a Commonwealth worthy of future generations.
stewardPage.pledgeClosing: For our people. By our people. Together. Forever.
stewardPage.ctaSubtitle: Founding Stewards are chosen from the first generation of members. Apply to the Founding Circle to begin.

constitutionPage.title: The Constitution
constitutionPage.heroTitle: The Constitution of the Ygente Network Commonwealth
constitutionPage.heroSubtitle: De Nuestra Gente. Para Nuestra Gente.
constitutionPage.heroEpigraph: Our prosperity is shared because our future is shared.
constitutionPage.intro: This Constitution establishes the principles by which our shared future shall be built. It is a living covenant—intended to endure beyond any founder, executive, or generation.
constitutionPage.ctaTitle: A covenant is only as strong as those who keep it.

creadoresPage.title: Creators
creadoresPage.heroTitle: Monetize your voice, strengthen your community
creadoresPage.heroSubtitle: Turn your audience into lasting prosperity. Earn on the outcomes you influence—even indirectly—with products that genuinely fit your content.
creadoresPage.step1Description: Tell us about your audience and the content you make.
creadoresPage.step2Description: Choose products that genuinely align with your voice and community.
creadoresPage.step3Description: Feature them naturally across your channels with your unique link.
creadoresPage.step4Description: Get paid for every sale you influence, even if you're not the last click.
creadoresPage.benefit3: AI Curator matched to your audience
